questions.subject: NSEC
questions.q: Which of the following statements is not true for $\mathrm{Ce}^{3+}$ and $\mathrm{Yb}^{3+}$ ?
options: Both show $4 f$ to 5 d transition

questions.subject: NSEC
questions.q:
An excess of aqueous ammonia is added to three different flasks ( $F_1, F_2, F_3$ ) containing aqueous solutions of $\mathrm{CuSO}_4, \mathrm{Fe}_2\left(\mathrm{SO}_4\right)_3$ and $\mathrm{NiSO}_4$ respectively.

Which of the following is correct about this addition?
I. A precipitate will be formed in all three flasks
II. Ammonia acts as a base as well as a ligand exchange reagent in $F_1$ and $F_3$
III. A soluble complex of $\mathrm{NH}_3$ and the metal ion is formed in $\mathrm{F}_1$ and $\mathrm{F}_3$
IV. A precipitate will be formed only in $F_2$

questions.subject: NSEC
questions.q: When excess $\mathrm{KMnO}_4$ is added to concentrated $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{SO}_4$, an oily green colored covalent compound $\mathbf{Y}$ is formed. Which of the following statements is/ are true for the above reaction.
options: Compound $\mathbf{Y}$ is formed by a dehydration reaction
In compound $\mathbf{Y}$ Mn is octahedrally surrounded by oxygen atoms
$\mathbf{Y}$ is the highest oxide of Manganese

questions.subject: NSEC
questions.q: In which of the following complexes the metal ion has the lowest ionic radius?

questions.subject: NSEC
questions.q: The orange colour of $\mathrm{K}_2 \mathrm{Cr}_2 \mathrm{O}_7$ and yellow colour of $\mathrm{K}_2 \mathrm{CrO}_4$ are, respectively, due to
options: charge transfer transitions and d-d transitions
d-d transitions and charge transfer transitions
